# Sigil Protocol

> Smart wallet security for AI agents. 3-layer Guardian validation on 6 EVM chains.
> **Full integration guide: https://sigil.codes/llms-full.txt**

## Quick Start

1. Auth: `POST /v1/agent/auth/api-key` → `{"apiKey": "sgil_..."}` → get JWT (4h TTL)
2. All requests: `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>`
3. Build callData: ABI-encode `execute(target, value, innerCallData)` — selector `0xb61d27f6`
4. Sign UserOp hash with agent private key (EIP-191 personal sign)
5. Submit: `POST /v1/execute` with `{userOp, chainId}`

## API Base: `https://api.sigil.codes/v1`

## ERC-4337 v0.7 UserOp Format

```json
{
  "sender": "0xYourSigilAccount",
  "nonce": "0x0",
  "callData": "0x...",
  "accountGasLimits": "0x00000000000000000000000000049d400000000000000000000000000007a120",
  "preVerificationGas": "60000",
  "gasFees": "0x0000000000000000000000000ba43b74000000000000000000000000ba43b7400",
  "signature": "0xAgentSignature..."
}
```

`accountGasLimits` = verificationGasLimit (16 bytes) || callGasLimit (16 bytes)
`gasFees` = maxPriorityFeePerGas (16 bytes) || maxFeePerGas (16 bytes)

Legacy v0.6 format (individual fields) also accepted for backwards compatibility.

## Chains & Factories (V12)

| Chain | ID | Factory |
|-------|-----|---------|
| Ethereum | 1 | `0x20f926bd5f416c875a7ec538f499d21d62850f35` |
| Polygon | 137 | `0x483D6e4e203771485aC75f183b56D5F5cDcbe679` |
| Avalanche | 43114 | `0x86e85de25473b432dabf1b9e8e8ce5145059b85b` |
| Base | 8453 | `0x5729291ed4c69936f5b5ace04dee454c6838fd50` |
| Arbitrum | 42161 | `0x2f4dd6db7affcf1f34c4d70998983528d834b8f6` |
| 0G | 16661 | `0x8bAD12A489338B533BCA3B19138Cd61caA17405F` |

EntryPoint (v0.7): `0x0000000071727De22E5E9d8BAf0edAc6f37da032` (all chains)
Guardian: `0xD06fBe90c06703C4b705571113740AfB104e3C67`

## Key Endpoints

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| POST | `/v1/agent/auth/api-key` | Authenticate with API key |
| POST | `/v1/evaluate` | Evaluate UserOp (dry run) |
| POST | `/v1/execute` | Evaluate + co-sign + submit |
| GET | `/v1/accounts/:addr` | Account info |
| GET | `/v1/accounts/discover?owner=0x...&chainId=N` | Find wallets by owner |
| PUT | `/v1/accounts/:addr/policy` | Update policy (owner only) |
| GET | `/v1/transactions?account=0x...` | Transaction history |

## Guardian Rejection Reasons

| Reason | Fix |
|--------|-----|
| TARGET_NOT_WHITELISTED | Owner whitelists target in Dashboard → Policies |
| FUNCTION_NOT_ALLOWED | Owner whitelists function selector |
| EXCEEDS_TX_LIMIT | Reduce value or increase maxTxValue |
| EXCEEDS_DAILY_LIMIT | Wait for reset or increase limit |
| SIMULATION_FAILED | Check calldata encoding, token balance, approvals |
| HIGH_RISK_SCORE | Review transaction — Guardian AI flagged it |

## Links

- Dashboard: https://sigil.codes
- GitHub: https://github.com/Arven-Digital/sigil-public
- X: https://x.com/sigilcodes
